---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or a bounded improvement for Canon
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What gap, friction, or missing capability are you seeing?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want Canon to support.

## Why This Belongs In Canon

Explain why this should be part of Canon itself rather than downstream workflow glue,
local scripts, or repository-specific customization.

## Boundaries And Non-Goals

Call out anything that should stay out of scope.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives, workarounds, or rejected approaches.

## Validation Or Evidence

If applicable, describe what validation, acceptance criteria, or evidence would show this feature is complete.

## PR

If you want to contribute an implementation, say so here and review [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) first.

## Additional Context

Add any links, examples, screenshots, or related issues.
